meta.title: FilmCan: verified camera-card backup for macOS
meta.description: FilmCan copies your camera media to multiple drives in one pass, hash-verifies every byte, and writes the manifests, so you know the backup is good before you wipe the card.
meta.og_description: Backup camera cards. Verified. To every drive at once.
hero.lead: FilmCan copies your media to multiple drives in a single pass, hash-verifies every byte, and writes the manifests, so you know the backup is good before you wipe the card.
hero.shot_alt: FilmCan app showing a backup copying to two drives, hash-verified.
how.h2: Three steps. FilmCan does the rest.
how.step1_p: Drag your card or folder into Copy From.
how.step2_p: Drop one or more drives into Save To. More drives = redundancy.
how.step3_p: One pass copies to every destination at once.
how.step4_p: FilmCan automatically hash-checks every byte and writes the manifest.
feat.fanout_p: N sources → M drives, read once, written everywhere in a single pass.
feat.hash_p: Fast mode or Paranoid mode (full re-read). ASC MHL plus chain manifests.
feat.stop_p: Clean stop, no partial files. Re-run skips what's already safe.
feat.netflix_p: Camera/Sound routing, roll folders, report scaffolds.
feat.safe_p: Disk-space and write tests on every destination before a single file is touched.
feat.org_p: Custom folder templates + camera/sound auto-detection. Netflix Ingest is one ready-made preset.
feat.push_p: ntfy and webhook alerts when a backup finishes or fails. No babysitting.
feat.history_p: Every run logged with per-destination result, speed, and duration.
feat.date_p: Custom day boundary for shoots that run past midnight.
dl.sub: Free and open source. Universal build for Apple Silicon & Intel.
dl.note: First launch: if macOS says the app is not safe to open, go to System Settings › Privacy & Security and click Open Anyway.
faq.a1: Yes. GPL-3.0 licensed and fully open source.
faq.q2: Does it work with my camera?
faq.a2: Any camera that mounts as storage: RED, ARRI, Sony, Canon, Panasonic, Blackmagic, GoPro, and more.
faq.a3: No file uploads. Transfers stay local; optional notifications send status metadata only.
faq.a4: Yes. Stop is clean with no partial files, and re-running skips files already backed up to every destination.
faq.a5: Fast mode checks the hash computed during copy; Paranoid mode re-reads every file from disk. FilmCan uses xxHash128.
support.report_bug: Report a bug / request a feature
support.donate_sub: FilmCan is free. Support keeps it going.
